title: Why is Iran striking Gulf Arab countries so hard?
fullText: NewsFeedIran has been striking more than military targets across the Gulf region. It’s been hitting oil and gas facilities, as well as civilian sites. Al Jazeera’s Virginia Pietromarchi looks at what’s behind Iran’s strategy.Published On 3 Mar 2026
summary: Iran has been striking more than military targets across the Gulf region, hitting oil and gas facilities.
